data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Failed payment retry logic' requirement, but there is no evidence presented that confirms the existence or functionality of this logic. The linked use case mentions various membership features but does not provide any details or API evidence related to payment retry mechanisms. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the necessary checks to validate this logic are absent.
gaps: No evidence of failed payment retry logic implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for payment retry logic
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the payment retry logic is implemented and functioning as expected.
